name: Ha Giang Loop on Motorbike 4 days: Dong Van, Ma Pi Leng & Local Villages
duration: Places:Heaven Gate - Yen Minh - Dong Van - Ma Pi Leng - Nho Que river - Meo Vac - Du Gia local village
highlights: Admire the panoramic views of the stunning valleys at Quan Ba Sky Gate
Observe the vibrant lifestyles of ethnic minorities at Dong Van Local Market
Venture to scenic Ma Pi Leng Pass for a stupendous sight of the Nho Que River
Immerse yourself in the pristine nature of Tham Luong Waterfall

itinerary.title: Hanoi to Ha Giang by bus (300km)
itinerary.description:
Today you will travel from Hanoi to Ha Giang. Several departure options are available, depending on your preferred schedule and bus type:

Morning option:

At 06:30, a minivan will pick you up from your hotel in Hanoi Old Quarter and transfer you to the bus station. At 13:00, take the limousine (13 seats) to Ha Giang City. At 11:00, a minivan will pick you up from your hotel and transfer you to the bus station. At 17:00, board the VIP sleeper bus (22 cabin) to Ha Giang City

itinerary.title: Ha Giang – Villages – Dong Van Ancient Town (135km)
itinerary.description:
Morning

At 03:30, arrive in Ha Giang City and rest for a few hours at our hostel before beginning the day’s journey. Around 07:30–08:00, enjoy breakfast in Ha Giang City. At 08:30, start the scenic drive with several cultural and natural stops along the way. The first stop is Minh Tan Market (open on Saturday), where you can explore the lively atmosphere and see how locals trade their goods. Continue to Quan Ba Sky Gate for panoramic valley views, and admire the famous Quan Ba Twin Mountains, renowned for their magical natural beauty

itinerary.title: Dong Van - Breathtaking Ma Pi Leng Pass - Du Gia (95 km)
itinerary.description:
Morning

Begin the day with breakfast at the homestay at 07:30 before continuing your journey deeper into Ha Giang. At 08:30, set out to explore the highlights along the route. Start at the Dong Van Local Market (open on Sundays), a bustling hub of culture where ethnic minorities gather to trade goods and socialize. From here, head towards the legendary Ma Pi Leng Peak, a spectacular 4 km stretch of the Sky Path that winds through limestone cliffs, Hmong villages, and cornfields. Continue along the Ma Pi Leng Pass, stopping at the top viewpoint for a breathtaking panorama of the Nho Que River ...

itinerary.title: Du Gia - Ha Giang
itinerary.description: After enjoying breakfast at the homestay at 08:00, begin the return journey to Ha Giang, with scenic stops along the way. Your first highlight is the beautiful Du Gia Waterfalls. Ride past old traditional houses surrounded by lush rice fields and rolling hills until you reach the clearest stream. Here, take a refreshing swim in the cool waters and relax with cold beers and light snacks. Continue to Thuong Village, where you’ll visit a local Hmong family and interact with the villagers

included: Accommodation as mentioned in the program (homestay sharing)
Meals as mentioned in the program
Transfers as mentioned in the program (included buses Hanoi - Ha Giang and back)
Entrance fees, donation and admissions for tours as mentioned in the itinerary
Service charge, room, driver, guide expenses and baggage handling
